{{CargoOrgan
|name=Cochlea of Gaia
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10886
|idx=97
|description=Earth's Will was dismembered by Demon Gods. Some organs were retrieved and given as Reconstruction Feast rewards.
|skill=
|hp=2270
|def=280
|atk=330
|rush=233
|gene1=Each round, {race} ATK +80
|gene2=In explorations, B-tads gained +10%
|gene3=In explorations, Demon God Cells collected +10%
|gene4=Each round, {race} RUSH +80
|gene5=In explorations, B-tads gained +10%
|gene6=In explorations, Demon God Cells collected +10%
|gene7=In explorations, B-tads gained +10% (Awakened)
|}}
